justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces, updates Spring to 6.x (removing deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter and WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter), and adopts Java 21 idioms like @Serial and @GetMapping. However, it retains the deprecated log4j 1.2.17 dependency and leaves the Hibernate Interceptor implementation incomplete (SaveOrUpdateInterceptor implements Interceptor but doesn't override required methods, which will cause compilation errors). The pom.xml also removes a duplicate javax.servlet dependency but doesn't address the log4j antipattern.
